summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sub-fase 1.11 - Returns & Barang Sisa. All backend APIs (13/13) and frontend flows tested successfully. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configuration fix verified - file upload endpoint now working. Navigation to Returns page via sidebar working correctly after fmtDate import fix.

working_endpoints: GET /api/sales-returns - list returns with filters (status, order_id, entity_id, return_type)
POST /api/sales-returns/{id}/approve - approve and adjust stock (admin/manager only)
POST /api/sales-returns/{id}/attachments - upload attachment (FILE UPLOAD NOW WORKING)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@kainnusantara.id)
Backend: Sales login (sales@kainnusantara.id)
Backend: Setup references (entity, warehouse, customer, product)
Backend: Create and confirm sales order (prerequisite for returns)
Backend: List returns with empty state and filters
Backend: Create draft return with items
Backend: Get return detail by ID
Backend: Submit return for approval (status transition: draft → pending_approval)
Backend: Upload attachment to return (FIXED - EMERGENT_LLM_KEY now configured)
Backend: Approve return with stock adjustment (creates inventory rolls and movements)
Backend: Reject return with reason
Backend: List returns with status filters (approved, rejected)
Backend: Validate return creation from invalid order status (correctly returns 400)
Frontend: Admin login via quick login button
Frontend: Navigate to Returns page via sidebar (Penjualan → Returns & Barang Sisa)
Frontend: Returns list view rendering with 6 existing returns
Frontend: Status filters (Semua, Draft, Menunggu, Approved, Ditolak) all functional
Frontend: Search functionality working (search by return number, order, customer)
Frontend: Return detail view accessible and displaying correctly
Frontend: Return detail shows items section and attachment upload section
Frontend: Create Return form accessible with order selection dropdown (16 eligible orders)
Frontend: Create Return form shows return type options and items section
Frontend: Navigation between views working (back button, cancel button)
